text: Der Premierminister Boris Johnson sprach gestern im britischen Parlament in London.
translation: Prime Minister Boris Johnson spoke yesterday in the British Parliament in London.

text: La empresa Google anuncio una nueva sede en la Ciudad de Mexico.
translation: The company Google announced a new headquarters in the City of Mexiko.

text: Le president Emmanuel Macron a rencontre la chanceliere Angela Merkel a Berlin.
translation: President Emmanuel Macron met Chancellor Angela Merkel in Berlin.

text: A equipe do Flamengo venceu o Campeonato Brasileiro no Maracana.
translation: The Flamenco team won the Brazilian Championship at the Maracana.

text: Toyota Motor Corporation hat seinen Hauptsitz in Toyota City, Aichi.
translation: Toyota Motor Corporation has its headquarters in Toyota City, Aichi.

text: La tour Eiffel a ete construite par Gustave Eiffel pour l'Exposition universelle de 1889.
translation: The Eiffel Tower was built by Gustav Eiffel for the Universal Exposition of 1889.

text: Microsoft adquirio Activision Blizzard por 68.7 mil millones de dolares.
translation: Microsoft acquired Activision Blizzard for 68.7 billion dollars.

text: Die Universitat Heidelberg wurde 1386 gegrundet und ist die alteste Universitat Deutschlands.
translation: The University of Heidelburg was founded in 1386 and is the oldest university in Germany.

text: O rio Amazonas atravessa varios paises da America do Sul incluindo o Brasil e o Peru.
translation: The Amazon River crosses several countries of South America including Brazil and Peru.

text: L'Organisation des Nations Unies a son siege a New York depuis 1952.
translation: The United Nations Organization has had its headquarters in New York since 1952.
